-- 1 of 3 --

The Replenishment Flow is an email or set of emails
that reminds customers to reorder products when
they run out (or are about to run out). In this lesson,
you’ll learn about how and, most importantly when
to craft a Replenishment Email and why they are very
important.
Why Replenishment Emails?
• 	Drive repeat purchases
• 	Very timely
• 	Highly relevant
Replenishment Email
If you have a product that requires replenishment,
draft up your Replenishment Email in the boxes
below.
Time Interval after Purchase:
LESSON:
REPLENISHMENT FLOW
MODULE:

MARKETING FOR
ECOMMERCE
ACTION ITEMS

draft up your Replenishment Email in your
